task.title: Apply imported report to editor with undo

requirements.description: Allow imported session report preview to be applied to editor fields (input/preset) and support one-click undo.
acceptance: Imported report card has an apply action
Apply updates editor input and selected preset from imported report page fields
Undo restores the previous editor state from snapshot
